rationale: No conflict. The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption (Tax Code §11.13(b)), while Educ. Code §54.366 governs tuition-and-fee exemptions for students formerly in DFPS conservatorship. The two provisions operate in unrelated domains.
quote: A student is exempt from the payment of tuition and fees authorized in this chapter
_note: Educ. Code §54.366 addresses higher education tuition exemptions for foster youth; it has no dependency on or reference to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
